title: Mandala Chart Goal-Setting Templates
subtitle: Structured 9x9 mandala goal templates across 9 life domains
description: A curated dataset of mandala chart (mandalart) goal-setting templates. Each entry contains a center goal, 8 sub-goals, and 64 actionable items organized in the 9x9 mandala structure popularized by Shohei Ohtani.

resources.description: Korean mandala chart templates (flat CSV format)
English mandala chart templates (flat CSV format)

history.changes: Initial v3 dataset — 1000 KO templates across 9 domains
